name: TCG Opal
description: TCG Opal is used by supported storage devices to provide hardware-backed locking.
fwupd can check this using the Linux Opal status ioctl on internal NVMe devices.
failure-impact: An attacker with physical access may be able to read data from removed storage media.

failure-results.not-enabled: TCG Opal locking is not enabled
failure-results.not-supported: TCG Opal locking is not available

resolution: Ensure that the internal storage device supports TCG Opal, and ensure it is enabled in the UEFI setup screen.
